items.title: New CBO report shows national debt spiraling into uncharted territory by 2035—and Trump’s tariff defeat will make the picture even worse
items.description: By 2035, the CBO expects the deficit to reach $2.96 trillion or 6.2% of GDP versus 5.8% today, and almost double the multi-decade, pre-pandemic averag...

items.title: Trump team livid about Dario Amodei’s principled stand to keep the Defense Department from using his AI tools for warlike purposes
items.description: Anthropic might lose its $200 million Defense Department contract after the company questioned how its AI model was used during the Maduro raid.

items.title: Jerome Powell knows the Fed’s balance sheet got too big—Kevin Warsh has a plan, he just has to sell it without freaking out the markets
items.description: "I've got a lot of sympathy for Warsh's view. But the transition from here to where he wants to get, could be problematic."

items.title: Trump loves cheap gas—but a military conflict in Iran could nearly double your price at the pump
items.description: As Trump builds the biggest military force since 2003 outside Iran, the U.S. impacts could swing from $2.50 to $5 gasoline.

items.title: Detroit automakers ask White House to be spared from new tariffs
items.description: The American Automotive Policy Council, which represents GM, Ford and Jeep-maker Stellantis, sent a letter to Trump’s trade team on Friday.
